query:
insert into TraceProperties (
                        last_collect_nr,
                        file_hash,
                        line,
                        property_key,
                        property_value
                    )
                    values (
                        $1,
                        $2,
                        $3,
                        $4,
                        $5
                    )
                    on conflict (file_hash, line, property_key)
                    do update set
                        last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr,
                        property_value = excluded.property_value
